selected_issues.title: [scorerebound] Research and sign up for affiliate programs — Self, Credit Karma, SoFi, Experian
selected_issues.reason: THE prerequisite for first dollar. ScoreRebound has a working quiz but $0 revenue because no affiliate accounts exist. Revenue model IS affiliate links. This is the single highest-leverage issue in the entire repo.

selected_issues.title: [all] Deploy landing pages for top 5 products to start SEO indexing NOW
selected_issues.reason: SEO indexing takes weeks/months. Every day a product is NOT deployed is a day Google isn't building equity. Scaffolds already exist for ghostboard, cliffcheck, afterloss, hoashield, billwatch. Deploy them NOW even as scaffolds — a live page starts earning SEO equity immediately. Time-critical multiplier across products.

selected_issues.title: [scorerebound] SEO content pages — IBR guide, rehab guide, servicer pages, sitemap
selected_issues.reason: Revenue funnel entry points. Users Google 'student loan credit score dropped' → land on content page → take quiz → get recovery plan → click affiliate link → revenue. Without these pages, there's no organic traffic to convert. All pages are SSG, no dependencies, unblocked.

selected_issues.title: [scorerebound] E2E CI broken — missing visual regression baseline snapshots for Linux
selected_issues.reason: Broken CI blocks ALL ScoreRebound PRs from merging safely. 24 test failures from missing Linux baseline snapshots + auth setup failure. Must fix to unblock the entire ScoreRebound development pipeline, including #285 (embed affiliate links) and #286 (SEO content).
